decisions.decision: Use Gemini 2.5 Flash as primary LLM
decisions.rationale: Low latency, cost-effective, supports streaming and function calling
High performance on tabular symptom data, 88.5% accuracy achieved
Native Django integration, handles real-time chat
Modern stack with fast dev server, type safety

next_action: Update Login.tsx with working JWT authentication - connect to /api/auth/login/ endpoint and store tokens in Zustand store
context_notes: Phase 5 just completed - LangChain agent tested and working with Gemini 2.5 Flash. ML model trained (88.5% accuracy). Now starting Phase 6 frontend work. Frontend dependencies installed. Skeleton components exist in frontend/src/pages/ but need real implementations connected to API and WebSocket.
